subject: English
title: Supplementary: Owen and Mzee (The Friendship)
summary: This touching true story follows Owen, a baby hippopotamus orphaned by a tsunami, who finds comfort and a second family with Mzee, a 130-year-old giant tortoise in Kenya.

sections.title: Part 1: The Tsunami and the Loss

mcqs.question: When did the tsunami occur?
mcqs.answer: The tsunami occurred on [[December 26, 2004]].

mcqs.question: In which country did the story take place?
mcqs.answer: It took place in the African country of [[Kenya]].

mcqs.question: Which animals were swimming by the ocean?
mcqs.answer: A group of [[hippopotamuses]] were swimming by the ocean.

mcqs.question: What struck the Kenyan coast?
mcqs.answer: The [[Indian Ocean tsunami]] struck the coast.

mcqs.question: What happened to the hippos?
mcqs.answer: They were carried away into the [[sea]] by tall, strong waves.

mcqs.question: When did the people come to look at the damage?
mcqs.answer: People came to the beach the [[next day]].

mcqs.question: Where did they see the baby hippo?
mcqs.answer: They saw the baby hippo on some [[rocks]].

mcqs.question: Could the people see the other hippos?
mcqs.answer: No, they [[couldn't see]] the rest of the group.

mcqs.question: What was the initial state of the baby hippo?
mcqs.answer: He was [[tired, frightened, and hungry]].

mcqs.question: Why was the baby hippo difficult to catch?
mcqs.answer: He was [[fast and slippery]] and rushed at the people.

mcqs.question: How much did the baby hippo weigh in pounds?
mcqs.answer: The baby weighed [[600 pounds]].

mcqs.question: What was his weight in kilograms?
mcqs.answer: His weight was about [[270 kg]].

mcqs.question: List the tools used for the rescue.
mcqs.answer: They used [[ropes, nets, boats, and cars]].

mcqs.question: Who finally caught the hippo?
mcqs.answer: A man called [[Owen]] wrestled him to the ground.

mcqs.question: Why was the hippo named Owen?
mcqs.answer: He was named after the man who [[rescued]] him.

mcqs.question: Where was Owen taken after the rescue?
mcqs.answer: He was taken to a [[wild life sanctuary]].

mcqs.question: What did everyone expect for Owen in the sanctuary?
mcqs.answer: Everyone thought he would be [[well looked after]] there.

mcqs.question: Was Owen happy initially in the sanctuary?
mcqs.answer: No, he was [[not happy]] at all; he was frightened.

mcqs.question: What was the first thing Owen did in the sanctuary?
mcqs.answer: He ran to a [[large greyish tortoise]].

mcqs.question: How did Owen behave towards the tortoise?
mcqs.answer: He ran to it and [[hid behind it]].

mcqs.question: What did the tortoise look like to Owen?
mcqs.answer: It looked a bit like his [[mother]].

mcqs.question: How old was the giant tortoise?
mcqs.answer: The tortoise was [[130 years old]].

mcqs.question: What was the name of the tortoise?
mcqs.answer: The tortoise was called [[Mzee]].

mcqs.question: How did Mzee react to Owen initially?
mcqs.answer: Mzee was [[very surprised]].

mcqs.question: Did Mzee allow Owen to stay near him?
mcqs.answer: Yes, he let Owen [[cuddle close]] to him.

mcqs.question: What was Owen's first problem in the sanctuary?
mcqs.answer: He did not know [[what to eat]] and [[how to eat]].

mcqs.question: Whom did Owen start copying?
mcqs.answer: He started [[copying Mzee]].

mcqs.question: What did Mzee teach Owen to eat?
mcqs.answer: He taught him to eat [[leaves and grasses]].

mcqs.question: What activities did they do together?
mcqs.answer: They would [[walk, swim, sleep, and eat]] together.

mcqs.question: How did they communicate?
mcqs.answer: They learnt to [[tell each other]] what they wanted to do.

mcqs.question: Why was this friendship astonishing?
mcqs.answer: It was unusual for a [[mammal]] and a [[reptile]] to bond.

mcqs.question: What did Owen lose and adopt?
mcqs.answer: He lost his [[mother]] and adopted a [[giant tortoise]].

mcqs.question: Did the friendship help Owen survive?
mcqs.answer: Yes, he learned to [[survive]] through this bond.

mcqs.question: How did they become famous?
mcqs.answer: Many [[news channels]] wrote and spoke about them.

mcqs.question: Where can we see their story today?
mcqs.answer: We can find many videos on the [[Internet]].

mcqs.question: Identify the group: eel, seal, walrus.
mcqs.answer: These are [[Sea / Marine animals]].

mcqs.question: Identify the group: pearl, coral, conch.
mcqs.answer: These are [[Sea products]].

mcqs.question: Identify the group: submarine, ship, yacht.
mcqs.answer: These are [[Water transport]].

mcqs.question: Identify the group: kite surfing, scuba diving.
mcqs.answer: These are [[Water sports]].

mcqs.question: Identify the group: albatross, penguin, pelican.
mcqs.answer: These are [[Sea birds]].
